description: Typed Lua (tlua) language support, powered by the native tlua language server.
tlua.customConfigFileName.description: Custom config file name to use e.g. 'tsconfig.all.json', before defaulting to tsconfig.json.
tlua.pprofDir.description: Directory to write pprof profiles to.
tlua.tsdk.description: Path to a directory containing a tlua binary (or a package that ships one). If not specified, the extension uses the bundled binary.
tlua.showDebugInfo.description: Show debug information (PID, executable path) in the server menu.
tlua.goMemLimit.description: Set GOMEMLIMIT for the language server (e.g., '2048MiB', '4GiB'). See https://pkg.go.dev/runtime#hdr-Environment_Variables for more information.
tlua.goMemLimit.error: Must be a valid memory limit (e.g., '2048MiB', '4GiB').
tlua.autoClosingTags.description: Enable/disable automatic closing of JSX tags.
tlua.enable.title: Enable tlua Language Server
tlua.disable.title: Disable tlua Language Server
tlua.restart.title: Restart Language Server
tlua.output.focus.title: Open Language Server Log
tlua.reportIssue.title: Report Issue
tlua.goToSourceDefinition.title: Go to Source Definition
tlua.sortImports.title: Sort Imports
tlua.removeUnusedImports.title: Remove Unused Imports
tlua.codeLens.showLocations.title: Show References of CodeLens
tlua.dev.runGC.title: tlua: Run Garbage Collection
tlua.dev.saveHeapProfile.title: tlua: Save Heap Profile
tlua.dev.saveAllocProfile.title: tlua: Save Allocation Profile
tlua.dev.startCPUProfile.title: tlua: Start CPU Profile
tlua.dev.stopCPUProfile.title: tlua: Stop CPU Profile
tlua.initializeAPIConnection.ui.title: tlua: Initialize API Connection
tlua.showFailedResponses.description: Controls whether an error notification is shown when a language server request fails.
tlua.showFailedResponses.always: Always show a notification when a request fails.
tlua.showFailedResponses.never: Never show a notification when a request fails.
tlua.showFailedResponses.auto: Show a notification only on VS Code Insiders.
